ogTitle: Toorak Gardens vs Tootenilla: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Toorak Gardens and Tootenilla.
heading: Toorak Gardens vs Tootenilla — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Toorak Gardens, South Australia and Tootenilla, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Toorak Gardens has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Tootenilla (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Toorak Gardens or Tootenilla safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Toorak Gardens has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Tootenilla scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Toorak Gardens scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Tootenilla scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Toorak Gardens or Tootenilla?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Toorak Gardens has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
